data.title: [scope-drift-reviewer agent registration]: agent dispatched as 'dso:scope-drift-reviewer' -> Available agents list shows 'dso:dso:scope-drift-reviewer' (double dso: prefix)
data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

Every plugin agent is registered under the \`dso:\` namespace exactly once. Dispatching \`dso:scope-drift-reviewer\` via the Task tool should resolve to the agent defined in \`plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md\` and run the scope-drift review.

#### Actual Behavior

During a fix-bug run, dispatching \`subagent_type: "dso:scope-drift-reviewer"\` returned the following error, with the agent listed as \`dso:dso:scope-drift-reviewer\` (double \`dso:\` prefix) in the Available agents enumeration:

\`\`\`
Error: Agent type 'dso:scope-drift-reviewer' not found. Available agents:
  claude-code-guide,
  dso:approach-decision-maker,
  dso:blue-team-filter,
  dso:bot-psychologist,
  dso:code-reviewer-deep-arch,
  dso:code-reviewer-deep-correctness,
  dso:code-reviewer-deep-hygiene,
  dso:code-reviewer-deep-verification,
  dso:code-reviewer-light,
  dso:code-reviewer-performance,
  dso:code-reviewer-security-blue-team,
  dso:code-reviewer-security-red-team,
  dso:code-reviewer-standard,
  dso:code-reviewer-test-quality,
  dso:completion-verifier,
  dso:complexity-evaluator,
  dso:conflict-analyzer,
  dso:doc-writer,
  dso:dso:scope-drift-reviewer,    <-- NOTE double prefix
  dso:feasibility-reviewer,
  dso:intent-search,
  dso:plan-review,
  dso:red-team-reviewer,
  dso:red-test-evaluator,
  dso:red-test-writer,
  dso:ui-designer,
  Explore, general-purpose, Plan, statusline-setup
\`\`\`

All other agents in the list are namespaced as \`dso:<name>\`; only scope-drift-reviewer appears as \`dso:dso:<name>\`.

### 3. Technical Environment

* Plugin: DSO, version 1.12.10 (from user log path)
* Agent file: \`plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md\`
* Caller: \`/dso:fix-bug\` Step 7.1 (Scope-Drift Review) dispatching the agent

### 4. Action History

* User-observed only. The dispatch failed with the error above. Agent list enumeration confirms the mis-registration is on the plugin side, not the caller side.

### 5. Investigation Pointers (non-speculative)

* The \`name:\` field in \`plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md\` frontmatter — check whether it is \`scope-drift-reviewer\` (correct) or \`dso:scope-drift-reviewer\` (would produce the double-prefix when the runtime applies the \`dso:\` namespace again)
* The \`agents\` array in \`plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json\` — confirm the entry is \`./agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md\` and matches the convention used for other agents
* Any build step that generates agent registration (\`build-review-agents.sh\`, similar) — confirm scope-drift-reviewer is not emitted with an extra \`dso:\` prefix
